Method.Name: createViews
main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement
Method.Source:
private str createSQLStatement() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.session_Id AS %1, r.start_Time AS %2, r.Status AS %3, r.Command AS %4, CONVERT([varchar](128), r.SQL_Handle, 1) AS %5, CONVERT([varchar](128), r.Plan_Handle, 1) AS %6, DB_NAME(r.database_id) AS %7, r.Blocking_Session_Id AS %8, ISNULL(r.Wait_Type, '') AS %9, r.Wait_Time AS %10, ISNULL(r.Last_Wait_Type, '') AS %11, r.Percent_Complete AS %12, CAST(r.Context_Info AS varchar(128)) AS %13, r.CPU_Time AS %14, r.Total_Elapsed_Time AS %15, r.Reads AS %16, r.Writes AS %17, r.Logical_Reads AS %18, r.Row_Count AS %19, r.Granted_query_Memory AS %20, r.Dop AS %21, ISNULL(r.parallel_Worker_Count, 0) AS %22, st.text AS %23, r.statement_start_offset AS %24, r.statement_end_offset AS %25, r.query_plan_hash AS %26, r.request_id AS %27, r.user_id AS %28, CONVERT([varchar](64), r.connection_id, 1) AS %29, r.wait_resource AS %30, r.open_transaction_count AS %31, r.open_resultset_count AS %32, r.transaction_id AS %33, r.estimated_completion_time AS %34, r.scheduler_id AS %35, CONVERT([varchar](64), r.task_address, 1) AS %36, r.text_size AS %37, r.language AS %38, r.date_format AS %39, r.date_first AS %40, r.quoted_identifier AS %41, r.arithabort AS %42, r.ansi_null_dflt_on AS %43, r.ansi_defaults AS %44, r.ansi_warnings AS %45, r.ansi_padding AS %46, r.ansi_nulls AS %47, r.concat_null_yields_null AS %48, r.transaction_isolation_level AS %49, r.lock_timeout AS %50, r.deadlock_priority AS %51, r.prev_error AS %52, r.nest_level AS %53, r.executing_managed_code AS %54, r.group_id AS %55, CONVERT([varchar](64), r.query_hash, 1) AS %56, CONVERT([varchar](130), r.statement_sql_handle, 1) AS %57, r.statement_context_id AS %58, CONVERT([varchar](64), r.external_script_request_id, 1) AS %59, r.is_resumable AS %60, CONVERT([varchar](64), r.page_resource, 1) AS %61, 1010 AS recId FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) AS st WHERE r.sql_handle IS NOT NULL", asSessionId, asStartTime, asStatus, asCommand, asSQLHandle, asPlanHandle, asDBName, asBlockingSessionId, asWaitType, asWaitTime, asLastWaitType, asPercentComplete, asContextInfo, asCPUTime, asElapsedTime, asReads, asWrites, asLogicalReads, asClientRowCount, asGrantedMemory, asDop, asWorkerCount, asSQLText, asStatementStartOffset, asStatementEndOffset, asQueryPlanHash, asRequestId, asUserId, asConnectionId, asWaitResource, asOpenTransactionCount, asOpenResultsetCount, asTransactionId, asEstimatedCompletionTime, asSchedulerId, asTaskAddress, asTextSize, asLanguage, asDateFormat, asDateFirst, asQuotedIdentifier, asArithabort, asAnsiNullDfltOn, asAnsiDefaults, asAnsiWarnings, asAnsiPadding, asAnsiNulls, asConcatNullYieldsNull, asTransactionIsolationLevel, asLockTimeout, asDeadlockPriority, asPrevError, asNestLevel, asExecutingManagedCode, asGroupId, asQueryHash, asStatementSqlHandle, asStatementContextId, asExternalScriptRequestId, asIsResumable, asPageResource);
return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: as
initialize
construct
